NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAR-29-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON SEP-16-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. ***[VACATED PER ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RELIEF UNDER CCP 631(G) FILED 10/27/20]***

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE OCT-16-2020 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER, DIGNITY HEALTH'S MOTION FOR RELIEF UNDER CCP SECTION 437, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PER ORDER OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE, THIS MOTION IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 206 FOR HEARING ON OCTOBER 27, 2020 AT 9:30AM. DEPARTMENT 610 AND THE PRESIDING JUDGE IN DEPARTMENT 206 HANDLE ALL TRIAL SETTING MATTERS INCLUDING DESIGNATING CASES FOR JURY TRIAL. (SEE SF LOCAL RULE 6.0(A).) JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-27-2020 IN 206, DEFENDANT(S) DIGNITY HEALTH DBA ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER ERRONEOUSLY NAMED AS ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER ACUTE REHABILITATION CENTER, ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER AND DIGNITY HEALTH'S MOTION FOR RELIEF UNDER CCP SECTION 437 WAS HEARD. TIFFANY SALA, ESQ. APPEARING FOR MOVING PARTY VIA COURTCALL. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT INFORMED COUNSEL THAT THIS MOTION SHOULD NOT HAVE BEEN BROUGHT UNDER CCP SEC 473(B) BUT RATHER UNDER CCP SEC 631(G). THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE RECORD IN THIS MATTER, ON ITS OWN MOTION, WILL GRANT THE MOTION FOR RELIEF UNDER CCP SEC 631(G) AND REINSTATE THE JURY DEMAND. JURY FEES HAVE BEEN POSTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT IN THIS INSTANCE, CIRCUMSTANCES ARE EXCUSABLE AND WITHIN THE DISCRETION OF THIS COURT. THE TRIAL DATE OF 03/29/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 REMAINS AND WILL BE SET AS A JURY TRIAL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MS. SALA TO SERVE ORDER. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER, DIGNITY HEALTH's Motion For Relief Under CCP Section 437.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Per order of the Presiding Judge, this motion is transferred to department 206 for hearing on October 27, 2020 at 9:30am. Department 610 and the Presiding Judge in department 206 handle all trial setting matters including designating cases for jury trial. (See SF Local Rule 6.0(A).)
